# Fabian Schuh

Fabian Schuh is a blockchain engineer and entrepreneur based in Buckenhof, Germany.
Founder of ChainSquad GmbH. PhD in communications engineering from FAU Erlangen-Nurnberg.
Built core infrastructure for BitShares, Steem, and Solana ecosystems.
Hackathon winner at Colosseum (Solana). SuperteamDE member.

Official website: https://xeroc.org
